καταλύων.gloss: I break up, overthrow, unharness, find a lodging
καταλύων.definition: (lit: I loosen thoroughly), (a) trans: I break up, overthrow, destroy, both lit. and met., (b) I unyoke, unharness a carriage horse or pack animal; hence: I put up, lodge, find a lodging.

καταλῦσαι.gloss: I break up, overthrow, unharness, find a lodging
καταλῦσαι.definition: (lit: I loosen thoroughly), (a) trans: I break up, overthrow, destroy, both lit. and met., (b) I unyoke, unharness a carriage horse or pack animal; hence: I put up, lodge, find a lodging.

καταμάθετε.definition: I understand, take in a fact about, consider carefully.

κατανοήσας.definition: I take note of, perceive, consider carefully, discern, detect, make account of.

κατανοήσατε.definition: I take note of, perceive, consider carefully, discern, detect, make account of.

κατανοεῖς.definition: I take note of, perceive, consider carefully, discern, detect, make account of.

καταπέτασμα.definition: (lit: that which is spread out downwards, that which hangs down), a curtain, veil, of that which separated the Holy of Holies from the outer parts of the temple at Jerusalem, also of an outer curtain at the entrance to the Holy Place in the same temple.

καταπίνοντες.definition: I drink down, swallow, devour, destroy, consume.

καταπατήσουσι(ν).definition: I trample down, trample under foot (lit. and met.), spurn.

καταπατεῖν.definition: I trample down, trample under foot (lit. and met.), spurn.

καταπατεῖσθαι.definition: I trample down, trample under foot (lit. and met.), spurn.

καταργεῖ.gloss: I bring to naught, sever, abolish
καταργεῖ.definition: (a) I make idle (inactive), make of no effect, annul, abolish, bring to naught, (b) I discharge, sever, separate from.

καταρτίζοντας.definition: (a) I fit (join) together; met: I compact together, (b) act. and mid: I prepare, perfect, for his (its) full destination or use, bring into its proper condition (whether for the first time, or after a lapse).

κατασκευάσει.definition: I build, construct, prepare, make ready.

κατασκηνοῦν.definition: I encamp, take up my quarters, tabernacle, pitch my tent, dwell.

καταστήσει.definition: I set down, bring down to a place; I set in order, appoint, make, constitute.

καταστήσω.definition: I set down, bring down to a place; I set in order, appoint, make, constitute.

καταφάγεται.gloss: I eat till it is finished
καταφάγεται.definition: I eat up, eat till it is finished, devour, squander, annoy, injure.

καταφαγών.gloss: I eat till it is finished
καταφαγών.definition: I eat up, eat till it is finished, devour, squander, annoy, injure.

καταφρονήσει.definition: I despise, scorn, and show it by active insult, disregard.

καταφρονήσητε.definition: I despise, scorn, and show it by active insult, disregard.

κατεάξει.definition: I break down (in pieces), crush, break into.

κατεαγῶσι(ν).definition: I break down (in pieces), crush, break into.

κατεκλίθη.definition: I cause to recline at table; mid. and pass: I recline at table.

κατεκρίθη.definition: I condemn, judge worthy of punishment.

κατελθόντων.definition: I come down from sky to earth, or from high land to lower land (or to the coast), or from the high seas to the shore.

κατεπατήθη.definition: I trample down, trample under foot (lit. and met.), spurn.

κατεσθίοντες.gloss: I eat till it is finished
κατεσθίοντες.definition: I eat up, eat till it is finished, devour, squander, annoy, injure.

κατεσθίουσι(ν).gloss: I eat till it is finished
κατεσθίουσι(ν).definition: I eat up, eat till it is finished, devour, squander, annoy, injure.

κατεσκήνωσε(ν).definition: I encamp, take up my quarters, tabernacle, pitch my tent, dwell.

κατεσκευασμένον.definition: I build, construct, prepare, make ready.

κατευθῦναι.definition: (a) I make straight, (b) met: I put in the right way, direct.

κατεῖχον.definition: (a) I hold fast, bind, arrest, (b) I take possession of, lay hold of, (c) I hold back, detain, restrain, (d) I hold a ship, keep its head.

κατηρτίσω.definition: (a) I fit (join) together; met: I compact together, (b) act. and mid: I prepare, perfect, for his (its) full destination or use, bring into its proper condition (whether for the first time, or after a lapse).

κατηρτισμένος.definition: (a) I fit (join) together; met: I compact together, (b) act. and mid: I prepare, perfect, for his (its) full destination or use, bring into its proper condition (whether for the first time, or after a lapse).

κατισχύσητε.gloss: I prevail against, overpower, am able
κατισχύσητε.definition: I prevail against, overpower, get the upper hand.

κατισχύσουσι(ν).gloss: I prevail against, overpower, am able
κατισχύσουσι(ν).definition: I prevail against, overpower, get the upper hand.

κατοικεῖ.gloss: I dwell in, settle in, inhabit
κατοικεῖ.definition: I dwell in, settle in, am established in (permanently), inhabit.

κατοικοῦντας.gloss: I dwell in, settle in, inhabit
κατοικοῦντας.definition: I dwell in, settle in, am established in (permanently), inhabit.

κατοικοῦντι.gloss: I dwell in, settle in, inhabit
κατοικοῦντι.definition: I dwell in, settle in, am established in (permanently), inhabit.

κατῃσχύνοντο.gloss: I shame, disgrace, put to utter confusion
κατῃσχύνοντο.definition: I shame, disgrace, bring to shame, put to utter confusion, frustrate.

κατῆλθε(ν).definition: I come down from sky to earth, or from high land to lower land (or to the coast), or from the high seas to the shore.

κατῴκησε(ν).gloss: I dwell in, settle in, inhabit
κατῴκησε(ν).definition: I dwell in, settle in, am established in (permanently), inhabit.

κείμενα.definition: I lie, recline, am placed, am laid, set, specially appointed, destined.

κείμεναι.definition: I lie, recline, am placed, am laid, set, specially appointed, destined.

κειμένην.definition: I lie, recline, am placed, am laid, set, specially appointed, destined.

κειρίαις.definition: a kind of girdle made of cords; a bandage, grave clothes.

κεκληκότι.definition: (a) I call, summon, invite, (b) I call, name.

κεκληκώς.definition: (a) I call, summon, invite, (b) I call, name.

κεκλημένοι.definition: (a) I call, summon, invite, (b) I call, name.

κεκλημένοις.definition: (a) I call, summon, invite, (b) I call, name.

κεκοίμηται.definition: I fall asleep, am asleep, sometimes of the sleep of death.

κεκοιμημένων.definition: I fall asleep, am asleep, sometimes of the sleep of death.

κεκοπιάκασι(ν).definition: (a) I grow weary, (b) I toil, work with effort (of bodily and mental labor alike).

κεκοπιάκατε.definition: (a) I grow weary, (b) I toil, work with effort (of bodily and mental labor alike).

κεκοπιακώς.definition: (a) I grow weary, (b) I toil, work with effort (of bodily and mental labor alike).

κεκοσμημένον.definition: I put into order; I decorate, deck, adorn.

κεκράτηνται.definition: I am strong, mighty, hence: I rule, am master, prevail; I obtain, take hold of; I hold, hold fast.

κεκόσμηται.definition: I put into order; I decorate, deck, adorn.

κενούς.definition: (a) empty, (b) met: empty (in moral content), vain, ineffective, foolish, worthless, (c) false, unreal, pretentious, hollow.

κεντυρίων.definition: a centurion, an officer commanding about a hundred infantry in the Roman army.

κεντυρίωνα.definition: a centurion, an officer commanding about a hundred infantry in the Roman army.

κεντυρίωνος.definition: a centurion, an officer commanding about a hundred infantry in the Roman army.

κενόν.definition: (a) empty, (b) met: empty (in moral content), vain, ineffective, foolish, worthless, (c) false, unreal, pretentious, hollow.

κεραία.definition: a little hook, an apostrophe on letters of the alphabet, distinguishing them from other little letters, or a separation stroke between letters.

κεραίαν.definition: a little hook, an apostrophe on letters of the alphabet, distinguishing them from other little letters, or a separation stroke between letters.

κερδήσας.definition: I gain, acquire, win (over), avoid loss.

κερδήσῃ.definition: I gain, acquire, win (over), avoid loss.

κερδῆσαι.definition: I gain, acquire, win (over), avoid loss.

κερματιστάς.definition: properly: a changer of large into smaller coins, a money-changer.

κεφαλάς.definition: (a) the head, (b) met: a corner stone, uniting two walls; head, ruler, lord.

κεφαλήν.definition: (a) the head, (b) met: a corner stone, uniting two walls; head, ruler, lord.

κεφαλῆς.definition: (a) the head, (b) met: a corner stone, uniting two walls; head, ruler, lord.

κεφαλῇ.definition: (a) the head, (b) met: a corner stone, uniting two walls; head, ruler, lord.

κεχρηματισμένον.definition: (originally: I transact business), (a) act. of God: I warn; pass: I am warned by God (probably in response to an inquiry as to one's duty), (b) (I take a name from my public business, hence) I receive a name, am publicly called.

κεῖται.definition: I lie, recline, am placed, am laid, set, specially appointed, destined.

κηφᾶς.definition: Cephas (Aramaic for rock), the new name given to Simon Peter, the apostle.

κιβωτόν.definition: (properly: a wooden box, hence) the Ark, in which Noah sailed; the Ark of the Covenant.

κινοῦντες.definition: I set in motion, move, remove, excite, stir up.

κινῆσαι.definition: I set in motion, move, remove, excite, stir up.

κλάδοις.definition: a young tender shoot, then: a branch; met: of descendants.

κλάδος.definition: a young tender shoot, then: a branch; met: of descendants.

κλάδους.definition: a young tender shoot, then: a branch; met: of descendants.

κλήρους.definition: (a) a lot, (b) a portion assigned; hence: a portion of the people of God assigned to one's care, a congregation.

κλίνας.gloss: I rest, recline, make to yield
κλίνας.definition: trans: I rest, recline; I bend, incline; I cause to give ground, make to yield; intrans: I decline, approach my end.

κλίνειν.gloss: I rest, recline, make to yield
κλίνειν.definition: trans: I rest, recline; I bend, incline; I cause to give ground, make to yield; intrans: I decline, approach my end.

κλίνην.definition: a couch, bed, portable bed or mat, a couch for reclining at meals, possibly also a bier.

κλίνης.definition: a couch, bed, portable bed or mat, a couch for reclining at meals, possibly also a bier.

κλίνῃ.gloss: I rest, recline, make to yield
κλίνῃ.definition: trans: I rest, recline; I bend, incline; I cause to give ground, make to yield; intrans: I decline, approach my end.

κλαύσῃ.definition: I weep, weep for, mourn, lament.

κλαῖε.definition: I weep, weep for, mourn, lament.

κλεοπᾶς.definition: Cleopas, one of the two companions of the risen Jesus from Jerusalem to Emmaus.

κληθέν.definition: (a) I call, summon, invite, (b) I call, name.

κληθήσεται.definition: (a) I call, summon, invite, (b) I call, name.

κληθήσονται.definition: (a) I call, summon, invite, (b) I call, name.

κληθήσῃ.definition: (a) I call, summon, invite, (b) I call, name.

κληθῆτε.definition: (a) I call, summon, invite, (b) I call, name.

κληθῇς.definition: (a) I call, summon, invite, (b) I call, name.

κληρονομήσει.definition: I inherit, obtain (possess) by inheritance, acquire.

κληρονομήσω.definition: I inherit, obtain (possess) by inheritance, acquire.

κληρονομία.definition: an inheritance, an heritage, regularly the gift of God to His chosen people, in the Old Testament: the Promised Land, in NT a possession viewed in one sense as present, in another as future; a share, participation.

κλητοί.definition: called, invited, summoned by God to an office or to salvation.

κλινίδιον.definition: a couch or litter of a sick person.

κλινιδίῳ.definition: a couch or litter of a sick person.

κλινουσῶν.gloss: I rest, recline, make to yield
κλινουσῶν.definition: trans: I rest, recline; I bend, incline; I cause to give ground, make to yield; intrans: I decline, approach my end.

κλινῶν.definition: a couch, bed, portable bed or mat, a couch for reclining at meals, possibly also a bier.

κλισίας.gloss: a dining couch, group of diners
κλισίας.definition: properly: a dining couch; hence: a group of diners.

κλωπᾶ.definition: Clopas, husband of one Mary, who stood by the cross.

κλύδωνι.definition: rough water, a wave, billow, surge.

κλῆρον.definition: (a) a lot, (b) a portion assigned; hence: a portion of the people of God assigned to one's care, a congregation.

κοίτην.definition: (a) a bed, (b) a marriage bed; plur: repeated (immoral) sexual intercourse.

κοδράντην.definition: a "quadrans," the smallest Roman copper coin, a quarter of an "as," the sixteenth part of a "sesterius".

κοδράντης.definition: a "quadrans," the smallest Roman copper coin, a quarter of an "as," the sixteenth part of a "sesterius".

κοιλία.definition: belly, abdomen, heart, a general term covering any organ in the abdomen, e.g. stomach, womb; met: the inner man.

κοιλίαι.definition: belly, abdomen, heart, a general term covering any organ in the abdomen, e.g. stomach, womb; met: the inner man.

κοιλίᾳ.definition: belly, abdomen, heart, a general term covering any organ in the abdomen, e.g. stomach, womb; met: the inner man.

κοιμωμένους.definition: I fall asleep, am asleep, sometimes of the sleep of death.

κοιμωμένων.definition: I fall asleep, am asleep, sometimes of the sleep of death.

κοιναῖς.definition: (a) common, shared, (b) Hebraistic use: profane; dirty, unclean, unwashed.

κοινοῦντα.definition: I make unclean, pollute, desecrate, mid: I regard (treat) as unclean.

κοινῶσαι.definition: I make unclean, pollute, desecrate, mid: I regard (treat) as unclean.

κοκκίνην.definition: crimson, scarlet, dyed with Kermes (coccum), the female coccus of the Kermes oak.

κολαφίζειν.definition: I strike with the fist, buffet; hence: I mistreat violently.

κολλυβιστῶν.definition: a money-changer, who changed heathen into Jewish money, for payment into the Temple treasury.

κολοβωθήσονται.definition: (lit: I maim, mutilate), I cut short, shorten, abbreviate.

κολυμβήθρα.definition: (lit: a diving or swimming place), a pool.

κολυμβήθραν.definition: (lit: a diving or swimming place), a pool.

κομίσασα.definition: (a) act: I convey, bring, carry, (b) mid: I receive back, receive what has belonged to myself but has been lost, or else promised but kept back, or: I get what has come to be my own by earning, recover.

κοπιάσαντες.definition: (a) I grow weary, (b) I toil, work with effort (of bodily and mental labor alike).

κοπιᾷ.definition: (a) I grow weary, (b) I toil, work with effort (of bodily and mental labor alike).

κοπιῶντες.definition: (a) I grow weary, (b) I toil, work with effort (of bodily and mental labor alike).

κοπιῶσι(ν).definition: (a) I grow weary, (b) I toil, work with effort (of bodily and mental labor alike).

κοράσιον.definition: a little girl, a young girl; a girl, maiden.

κορασίῳ.definition: a little girl, a young girl; a girl, maiden.

κορβᾶν.definition: a gift, offering, anything consecrated to God.

κοσμεῖτε.definition: I put into order; I decorate, deck, adorn.

κράβαττον.definition: a bed, mattress, mat of a poor man.

κράτιστε.definition: most excellent, an official epithet, used in addressing a Roman of high rank, and in the second century one of equestrian (as distinguished from senatorial) rank.

κράτος.definition: dominion, strength, power; a mighty deed.

κρέμαται.definition: I hang, hang up, suspend; mid: I am hanging, hang.

κρίματι.definition: (a) a judgment, a verdict; sometimes implying an adverse verdict, a condemnation, (b) a case at law, a lawsuit.

κρίνα.definition: a lily growing wild, variously identified with the red anemone, the whole lily, the sword lily.

κρίνατε.definition: (a) I judge, whether in a law-court or privately: sometimes with cognate nouns emphasizing the notion of the verb, (b) I decide, I think (it) good.

κρίνει.definition: (a) I judge, whether in a law-court or privately: sometimes with cognate nouns emphasizing the notion of the verb, (b) I decide, I think (it) good.

κρίσει.definition: judging, judgment, decision, sentence; generally: divine judgment; accusation.

κρίσιν.definition: judging, judgment, decision, sentence; generally: divine judgment; accusation.

κραβάττοις.definition: a bed, mattress, mat of a poor man.

κρατήσαντες.definition: I am strong, mighty, hence: I rule, am master, prevail; I obtain, take hold of; I hold, hold fast.

κρατήσας.definition: I am strong, mighty, hence: I rule, am master, prevail; I obtain, take hold of; I hold, hold fast.

κρατήσατε.definition: I am strong, mighty, hence: I rule, am master, prevail; I obtain, take hold of; I hold, hold fast.

κρατήσωσι(ν).definition: I am strong, mighty, hence: I rule, am master, prevail; I obtain, take hold of; I hold, hold fast.

κραυγῇ.definition: (a) a shout, cry, clamor, (b) outcry, clamoring against another.

κρεμασθέντων.definition: I hang, hang up, suspend; mid: I am hanging, hang.

κρεμασθῇ.definition: I hang, hang up, suspend; mid: I am hanging, hang.

κριθήσεσθε.definition: (a) I judge, whether in a law-court or privately: sometimes with cognate nouns emphasizing the notion of the verb, (b) I decide, I think (it) good.

κριθῆναι.definition: (a) I judge, whether in a law-court or privately: sometimes with cognate nouns emphasizing the notion of the verb, (b) I decide, I think (it) good.

κριθῆτε.definition: (a) I judge, whether in a law-court or privately: sometimes with cognate nouns emphasizing the notion of the verb, (b) I decide, I think (it) good.

κρινεῖ.definition: (a) I judge, whether in a law-court or privately: sometimes with cognate nouns emphasizing the notion of the verb, (b) I decide, I think (it) good.

κρούειν.definition: I knock, beat a door with a stick, to gain admittance.

κρούοντι.definition: I knock, beat a door with a stick, to gain admittance.

κρούσαντος.definition: I knock, beat a door with a stick, to gain admittance.

κρυπτόν.definition: hidden, secret; as subst: the hidden (secret) things (parts), the inward nature (character).

κρυπτῷ.definition: hidden, secret; as subst: the hidden (secret) things (parts), the inward nature (character).

κρύπτην.definition: a cellar, vault, hidden place, crypt.

κτήματα.definition: a piece of landed property, a field; plur: possessions, property, possibly landed property, property in land.

κτήσασθε.definition: (a) I acquire, win, get, purchase, buy, (b) I possess, win mastery over.

κτήσησθε.definition: (a) I acquire, win, get, purchase, buy, (b) I possess, win mastery over.

κτίσας.definition: I create, form, shape, make, always of God.

κτίσει.definition: (often of the founding of a city), (a) abstr: creation, (b) concr: creation, creature, institution; always of Divine work, (c) an institution, ordinance.

κτίσεως.definition: (often of the founding of a city), (a) abstr: creation, (b) concr: creation, creature, institution; always of Divine work, (c) an institution, ordinance.

κτῆνος.definition: a beast of burden (generally, a horse or mule) either for riding or for carrying loads on its back, or for yoking to a cart or carriage.

κτῶμαι.definition: (a) I acquire, win, get, purchase, buy, (b) I possess, win mastery over.

κυλλούς.definition: crippled, lame, especially in the hands.

κυλλόν.definition: crippled, lame, especially in the hands.

κυνάρια.definition: a little dog, a house dog.

κυναρίοις.definition: a little dog, a house dog.

κυρηνίου.definition: Cyrenius or Quirinius, governor of Syria.

κυσί(ν).definition: a dog, universally despised in the East.

κωλύετε.definition: I prevent, debar, hinder; with infin: from doing so and so.

κωλύοντα.definition: I prevent, debar, hinder; with infin: from doing so and so.

κωλύσῃς.definition: I prevent, debar, hinder; with infin: from doing so and so.

κωμοπόλεις.definition: a large village, a city which in constitution has only the status of a village; a country town.

κωσάμ.definition: Cosam, son of Elmadam and father of Addi.

κόλασιν.definition: chastisement, punishment, torment, perhaps with the idea of deprivation.

κόλποις.gloss: bosom, bosom of a garment, a bay, gulf

ἔθυον.definition: I sacrifice, generally an animal; hence: I kill.

ἔκειτο.definition: I lie, recline, am placed, am laid, set, specially appointed, destined.

ἔλαχε(ν).definition: (a) I obtain (receive) by lot, my lot (turn) is, (b) I draw lots.

ἔλεγε(ν).definition: (denoting speech in progress), (a) I say, speak; I mean, mention, tell, (b) I call, name, especially in the pass., (c) I tell, command.

ἔλυε(ν).definition: (a) I loose, untie, release, (b) met: I break, destroy, set at naught, contravene; I break up a meeting, annul.

ἔμειναν.definition: I remain, abide, stay, wait; with acc: I wait for, await.

ἔμεινε(ν).definition: I remain, abide, stay, wait; with acc: I wait for, await.

ἔμελε(ν).gloss: it is a care, it concerns
ἔμελε(ν).definition: it is a care, it is an object of anxiety, it concerns.

ἔμελλε(ν).definition: I intend, am about to; I delay, linger.

ἔμελλον.definition: I intend, am about to; I delay, linger.

ἔμενε(ν).definition: I remain, abide, stay, wait; with acc: I wait for, await.

ἔμπροσθεν.definition: in front, before the face; sometimes made a subst. by the addition of the article: in front of, before the face of.

ἔνιψα.definition: I wash; mid. I wash my own (hands, etc.).

ἔνιψε(ν).definition: I wash; mid. I wash my own (hands, etc.).

ἔνοχον.definition: involved in, held in, hence: liable, generally with dat. (or gen.) of the punishment.

ἔνοχος.definition: involved in, held in, hence: liable, generally with dat. (or gen.) of the punishment.

ἔντιμος.definition: (held precious, hence) precious, honored, honorable in rank.

ἔξελε.definition: I take out, remove; sometimes (mid): I choose, sometimes: I rescue.

ἔξοδον.definition: (a) an exit, going out, departure from a place; the exodus, (b) death.

ἔξωθεν.definition: (a) from outside, from without, (b) outside, both as adj. and prep; with article: the outside.

ἔπαθον.definition: I am acted upon in a certain way, either good or bad; I experience ill treatment, suffer.

ἔπεμψε(ν).definition: I send, transmit, permit to go, put forth.

ἔπεσαν.definition: I fall, fall under (as under condemnation), fall prostrate.

ἔπιπτε(ν).definition: I fall, fall under (as under condemnation), fall prostrate.

ἔπνευσαν.definition: I blow, breathe, as the wind.

ἔπνιγε(ν).definition: I choke, throttle, strangle; hence: I drown.

ἔπραξα.definition: I do, perform, accomplish; be in any condition, i.e. I fare; I exact, require.

ἔπραξε(ν).definition: I do, perform, accomplish; be in any condition, i.e. I fare; I exact, require.

ἔργῳ.definition: work, task, employment; a deed, action; that which is wrought or made, a work.

ἔρημον.definition: as an adj: deserted, desolate, waste; hence: the desert, to the east and south of Palestine; of a person: deserted, abandoned, desolate.

ἔρρηξε(ν).definition: I rend, break asunder; I break forth (into speech); I throw or dash down.

ἔρριπται.definition: I throw, cast, toss, set down; pass: I am dispersed.

ἔσθητε.definition: I eat, partake of food; met: I devour, consume (e.g. as rust does).

ἔστη.definition: trans: (a) I make to stand, place, set up, establish, appoint; mid: I place myself, stand, (b) I set in balance, weigh; intrans: (c) I stand, stand by, stand still; met: I stand ready, stand firm, am steadfast.

ἔστηκε(ν).definition: trans: (a) I make to stand, place, set up, establish, appoint; mid: I place myself, stand, (b) I set in balance, weigh; intrans: (c) I stand, stand by, stand still; met: I stand ready, stand firm, am steadfast.

ἔστησαν.definition: trans: (a) I make to stand, place, set up, establish, appoint; mid: I place myself, stand, (b) I set in balance, weigh; intrans: (c) I stand, stand by, stand still; met: I stand ready, stand firm, am steadfast.

ἔστησε(ν).definition: trans: (a) I make to stand, place, set up, establish, appoint; mid: I place myself, stand, (b) I set in balance, weigh; intrans: (c) I stand, stand by, stand still; met: I stand ready, stand firm, am steadfast.

ἔσωθεν.definition: (a) from within, from inside, (b) within, inside; with the article: the inner part, the inner element, (c) the mind, soul.

ἔτεκε(ν).definition: I bear, bring forth, produce, beget, yield.

ἔτρεχον.definition: I run, exercise myself, make progress.

ἔτυπτε(ν).definition: I beat, strike, wound, inflict punishment.

ἔτυπτον.definition: I beat, strike, wound, inflict punishment.

ἔφαγε(ν).definition: I eat, partake of food; met: I devour, consume (e.g. as rust does).

ἔφερον.definition: I carry, bear, bring; I conduct, lead; perhaps: I make publicly known.

ἔφθασε(ν).definition: (a) I anticipate, precede, (b) I come, arrive.

ἕκαστον.definition: each (of more than two), every one.

ἕκαστος.definition: each (of more than two), every one.

ὦ.definition: O, an exclamation, used in addressing someone.

ὦτα.definition: (a) the ear, (b) met: the faculty of perception.

ὧραι.definition: (a) a definite space of time, a season, (b) an hour, (c) the particular time for anything.

ᾠκοδόμησε(ν).definition: I erect a building, build; fig. of the building up of character: I build up, edify, encourage.

ᾠκοδόμητο.definition: I erect a building, build; fig. of the building up of character: I build up, edify, encourage.

ᾠκοδόμουν.definition: I erect a building, build; fig. of the building up of character: I build up, edify, encourage.

ῥάβδον.definition: a rod, staff, staff of authority, scepter.

ῥάκους.definition: a piece of cloth, a remnant torn off.

ῥάπισμα.definition: a slap, blow on the cheek with the open hand.

ῥήγνυνται.definition: I rend, break asunder; I break forth (into speech); I throw or dash down.

ῥήμασι(ν).definition: a thing spoken, (a) a word or saying of any kind, as command, report, promise, (b) a thing, matter, business.

ῥήματα.definition: a thing spoken, (a) a word or saying of any kind, as command, report, promise, (b) a thing, matter, business.

ῥήματι.definition: a thing spoken, (a) a word or saying of any kind, as command, report, promise, (b) a thing, matter, business.

ῥήματος.definition: a thing spoken, (a) a word or saying of any kind, as command, report, promise, (b) a thing, matter, business.

ῥήξει.definition: I rend, break asunder; I break forth (into speech); I throw or dash down.

ῥήξωσι(ν).definition: I rend, break asunder; I break forth (into speech); I throw or dash down.

ῥήσσει.definition: I rend, break asunder; I break forth (into speech); I throw or dash down.

ῥίζαν.gloss: a root, that which comes from the root
ῥίζαν.definition: a root, shoot, source; that which comes from the root, a descendent.

ῥίψαν.definition: I throw, cast, toss, set down; pass: I am dispersed.

ῥίψας.definition: I throw, cast, toss, set down; pass: I am dispersed.

ῥαμά.definition: Rama, a place in Ephraim, two hours north of Jerusalem.

ῥαπίζει.definition: I slap, strike, smite with the hand.

ῥαπίσμασι(ν).definition: a slap, blow on the cheek with the open hand.

ῥαπίσματα.definition: a slap, blow on the cheek with the open hand.

ῥαχάβ.definition: Rahab, a Canaanitess, who rescued the Hebrew spies at Jericho.

ῥαχήλ.definition: Rachel, younger wife of the patriarch Jacob.

ῥηθέν.definition: (denoting speech in progress), (a) I say, speak; I mean, mention, tell, (b) I call, name, especially in the pass., (c) I tell, command.

ῥηθείς.definition: (denoting speech in progress), (a) I say, speak; I mean, mention, tell, (b) I call, name, especially in the pass., (c) I tell, command.

ῥημάτων.definition: a thing spoken, (a) a word or saying of any kind, as command, report, promise, (b) a thing, matter, business.

ῥιζῶν.gloss: a root, that which comes from the root
ῥιζῶν.definition: a root, shoot, source; that which comes from the root, a descendent.

ῥοβοάμ.definition: Rehoboam, son of Solomon, and King of Israel.

ῥομφαία.definition: a sword, scimitar; fig: war, piercing grief.

ῥούθ.definition: Ruth, wife of Boaz and mother of Obed.

ῥούφου.definition: Rufus, a Christian man in Rome, probably to be identified with the brother of Alexander and son of Simon of Cyrene.

ῥυσάσθω.definition: I rescue, deliver (from danger or destruction).

ῥυσθέντας.definition: I rescue, deliver (from danger or destruction).

ῥύμαις.definition: a narrow street or lane in a town or city.

ῥύμας.definition: a narrow street or lane in a town or city.

ῥῆμα.definition: a thing spoken, (a) a word or saying of any kind, as command, report, promise, (b) a thing, matter, business.

ῥῦσαι.definition: I rescue, deliver (from danger or destruction).
